message:
feat(runtime): add hybrid mode detection on engine init

Add tryEnableHybridMode() to MixtralLazyEngine init:
- Checks for CSR file at model path
- Calls moe_engine.loadHybridCSR() to load sparse outliers
- Logs hybrid mode status on startup

When hybrid mode is enabled:
- Uses Q2_K base weights (RAM-resident)
- Applies FP16 sparse corrections from CSR
- Target: 30 TPS vs 3 TPS streaming

To enable hybrid mode:
1. Run outlier-analyzer on model
2. Run hybrid-quantizer to create CSR
3. Create Q2_K model via llama-quantize
4. CSR file auto-detected on next run
